sections.paragraph:
ἐνορκίζω 1 aor. ἐνώρκισα 2 Esdr 23:25 cod. A (act. CIG IV, 9288, 6; IG XII/3, 1238, 7; MAMA III, 77, 1) to put someone under oath, adjure, cause someone (τινά) to swear τι by someth. w. acc. and inf. foll. ὑμᾶς τὸν κύριον you by the Lord 1 Th 5:27 (B-D-F §149; 155, 7; 392, 1d; Rob. 484; 1085).—DELG s.v. ὅρκος. M-M. TW.

aor. aor. = aorist

act. act. = active

CIG CIG = Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum—List 3

IG IG = Inscriptiones Graecae—List 3

MAMA MAMA = Monumenta Asiae Minoris Antiqua—List 3

someth. someth. = something

acc. acc. = accusative

inf. inf. = infinitive

foll. foll. = followed, following

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

Rob. Rob. = ATRobertson, A Grammar of the Greek NT in the Light of Historical Research—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 338
